name: Steelswarm Scout
name_jp: インヴェルズの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>斥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>候</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: At the start of your Main Phase 1, if you control no Spell/Trap Cards: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard. You cannot Special Summon another monster(s) the turn you activate this effect. While this card is face-up on the field, it cannot be Tributed, except for the Tribute Summon of a "Steelswarm" monster, and cannot be used as a Synchro Material Monster.
mnst_eff: At the start of your Main Phase 1, if you control no Spell/Trap Cards: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard. You cannot Special Summon another monster(s) the turn you activate this effect. While this card is face-up on the field, it cannot be Tributed, except for the Tribute Summon of a "Steelswarm" monster, and cannot be used as a Synchro Material Monster.
eff: At the start of your Main Phase 1, if you control no Spell/Trap Cards: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard. While this card is face-up on the field, it cannot be Tributed, except for the Tribute Summon of a "Steelswarm" monster, and cannot be used as a Synchro Material Monster.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
misc: At the start of Main Phase 1
